subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
The hormone that prepares the body for an emergency is …
A aldosterone.
B progesterone.
C adrenalin.
D prolactin.
question_af:
Die hormoon wat die liggaam vir ʹn noodtoestand voorberei, is …
A aldosteroon.
B progesteroon.
C adrenalien.
D prolaktien.
memo_steps: C — adrenalin

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
Which ONE of the following are functions of the placenta?
A Excretion and nutrition
B Gaseous exchange and protection against mechanical injury
C Nutrition and temperature regulation
D Temperature regulation and excretion
question_af:
Watter EEN van die volgende is funksies van die plasenta?
A Ekskresie en voeding
B Gaswisseling en beskerming teen meganiese besering
C Voeding en temperatuurregulering
D Temperatuurregulering en ekskresie
memo_steps: A — Excretion and nutrition

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
The table below shows the reaction time of four learners to a stimulus.

NAME OF LEARNER | REACTION TIME (SECONDS)
Temisha | 0,7
Luke | 0,6
Anika | 0,8
Jordy | 0,4

Which ONE of the following learners demonstrates the fastest response to the stimulus?
A Temisha
B Luke
C Anika
D Jordy
question_af:
Die tabel hieronder toon die reaksietyd van vier leerders op ʹn stimulus.

NAAM VAN LEERDER | REAKSIETYD (SEKONDES)
Temisha | 0,7
Luke | 0,6
Anika | 0,8
Jordy | 0,4

Watter EEN van die volgende leerders toon die vinnigste reaksie op die stimulus?
A Temisha
B Luke
C Anika
D Jordy
memo_steps: D — Jordy (0,4 seconds is the shortest reaction time)
notes: Data is fully embedded in text; no external diagram needed

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
A high level of thyroxin in the blood will stimulate the …
A pituitary gland to secrete less TSH.
B thyroid gland to secrete more TSH.
C pituitary gland to secrete more TSH.
D thyroid gland to secrete more thyroxin.
question_af:
ʹn Hoë vlak van tiroksien in die bloed sal die volgende stimuleer:
A Die pituïtêre klier om minder TSH af te skei
B Die tiroïedklier om meer TSH af te skei
C Die pituïtêre klier om meer TSH af te skei
D Die tiroïedklier om meer tiroksien af te skei
memo_steps: A — pituitary gland to secrete less TSH (negative feedback)

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
The following is a list of male reproductive parts:
(i) Prostate gland
(ii) Seminal vesicle
(iii) Urethra
(iv) Cowper's gland

Which ONE of the following combinations is responsible for the formation of semen?
A (i) and (ii) only
B (i), (ii) and (iv) only
C (ii) and (iii) only
D (i) and (iv) only
question_af:
Die volgende is ʹn lys van dele van die manlike voortplantingstelsel:
(i) Prostaatklier
(ii) Semenvesikel
(iii) Uretra
(iv) Cowper se klier

Watter EEN van die volgende kombinasies is verantwoordelik vir die vorming van semen?
A Slegs (i) en (ii)
B Slegs (i), (ii) en (iv)
C Slegs (ii) en (iii)
D Slegs (i) en (iv)
memo_steps: B — (i), (ii) and (iv) only: Prostate gland, Seminal vesicle, and Cowper's gland all contribute secretions to form semen

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
The following is a list of growth responses in plants:
(i) Plants grow straight upwards
(ii) No upward growth
(iii) Increased number of lateral branches
(iv) Stems bend towards unilateral light

Which ONE of the following combinations describes the growth responses that occur when apical buds of plants are removed?
A (i), (ii) and (iii) only
B (ii) and (iii) only
C (i) and (iv) only
D (i), (ii), (iii) and (iv)
question_af:
Die volgende is ʹn lys van groeireaksies by plante:
(i) Plante groei reguit opwaarts
(ii) Geen opwaartse groei nie
(iii) Verhoogde aantal sytakke
(iv) Stingels buig na eensydige lig toe

Watter EEN van die volgende kombinasies beskryf die groeireaksies wat plaasvind wanneer die eindknoppe van plante verwyder word?
A Slegs (i), (ii) en (iii)
B Slegs (ii) en (iii)
C Slegs (i) en (iv)
D (i), (ii), (iii) en (iv)
memo_steps: B — (ii) and (iii) only: removal of apical bud stops upward growth and releases lateral buds from apical dominance, causing increased branching

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
Which ONE of the following is CORRECT for a person who exercises on a hot day without taking in any liquids?
A Increased ADH secretion and increased permeability of renal tubules
B Increased ADH secretion and the production of dilute urine
C Decreased ADH secretion and increased permeability of renal tubules
D Decreased ADH secretion and the production of concentrated urine
question_af:
Watter EEN van die volgende is KORREK vir ʹn persoon wat op ʹn warm dag oefen sonder om enige vloeistowwe in te neem?
A Verhoogde ADH-sekresie (afskeiding) en verhoogde deurlaatbaarheid van nierbuisies
B Verhoogde ADH-sekresie en die produksie van verdunde urine
C Verlaagde ADH-sekresie en verhoogde deurlaatbaarheid van nierbuisies
D Verlaagde ADH-sekresie en die produksie van gekonsentreerde urine
memo_steps: A — Increased ADH secretion (due to lower blood water potential) and increased permeability of renal tubules (allowing more water reabsorption)

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: Give the correct biological term for the following description: The ovarian hormone that is secreted by the corpus luteum.
question_af: Gee die korrekte biologiese term vir die volgende beskrywing: Die ovariale hormoon wat deur die corpus luteum gesekreteer (afgeskei) word.
memo_steps: Progesterone

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: Give the correct biological term for the following description: The eye defect that is characterised by a cloudy lens.
question_af: Gee die korrekte biologiese term vir die volgende beskrywing: Die oogdefek wat deur ʹn dowwe lens gekenmerk word.
memo_steps: Cataracts

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: Give the correct biological term for the following description: The production of ova by meiosis.
question_af: Gee die korrekte biologiese term vir die volgende beskrywing: Die produksie van ovums deur meiose.
memo_steps: Oogenesis

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: Give the correct biological term for the following description: The part of the retina that contains no rods and cones.
question_af: Gee die korrekte biologiese term vir die volgende beskrywing: Die deel van die retina wat geen stafies en keëltjies bevat nie.
memo_steps: Blind spot

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: Give the correct biological term for the following description: The release of an ovum from the ovary.
question_af: Gee die korrekte biologiese term vir die volgende beskrywing: Die vrystelling van ʹn ovum deur die ovarium.
memo_steps: Ovulation

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: Give the correct biological term for the following description: The extra-embryonic membrane that plays a role in the formation of the placenta.
question_af: Gee die korrekte biologiese term vir die volgende beskrywing: Die ekstraëmbrioniese membraan wat ʹn rol in die vorming van die plasenta speel.
memo_steps: Chorion

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: Give the correct biological term for the following description: A plant hormone responsible for seed dormancy.
question_af: Gee die korrekte biologiese term vir die volgende beskrywing: ʹn Planthormoon wat vir die dormansie (rustoestand) van sade verantwoordelik is.
memo_steps: Abscisic acid

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: Give the correct biological term for the following description: The maintenance of a constant internal environment within narrow limits.
question_af: Gee die korrekte biologiese term vir die volgende beskrywing: Die instandhouding van ʹn konstante interne omgewing binne klein grense.
memo_steps: Homeostasis

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
Indicate whether the following description applies to A ONLY, B ONLY, BOTH A AND B or NONE of the items.
Description: The hormone responsible for the development of secondary sexual characteristics during puberty.
A: Oestrogen
B: Testosterone
question_af:
Dui aan of die volgende beskrywing van toepassing is op SLEGS A, SLEGS B, BEIDE A EN B of GEENEEN van die items nie.
Beskrywing: Die hormoon wat gedurende puberteit vir die ontwikkeling van sekondêre geslagskenmerke verantwoordelik is.
A: Estrogeen
B: Testosteroon
memo_steps: Both A and B — oestrogen drives female secondary sexual characteristics; testosterone drives male secondary sexual characteristics; both are involved at puberty

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
Indicate whether the following description applies to A ONLY, B ONLY, BOTH A AND B or NONE of the items.
Description: Plays a role in the pupillary mechanism.
A: Ciliary muscles
B: Radial muscles
question_af:
Dui aan of die volgende beskrywing van toepassing is op SLEGS A, SLEGS B, BEIDE A EN B of GEENEEN van die items nie.
Beskrywing: Speel ʹn rol by die pupilmeganisme.
A: Siliêre spiere
B: Radiale spiere
memo_steps: B only — radial muscles of the iris dilate the pupil; ciliary muscles control lens shape (accommodation), not the pupillary reflex

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
Indicate whether the following description applies to A ONLY, B ONLY, BOTH A AND B or NONE of the items.
Description: A plant defence mechanism.
A: Thorns
B: Chemicals
question_af:
Dui aan of die volgende beskrywing van toepassing is op SLEGS A, SLEGS B, BEIDE A EN B of GEENEEN van die items nie.
Beskrywing: ʹn Plantverdedigingsmeganisme.
A: Dorings
B: Chemikalieë
memo_steps: Both A and B — thorns are physical defences; chemicals (e.g. tannins, alkaloids) are chemical defences; both are plant defence mechanisms

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
In bird eggs, the yolk is the main source of energy for the developing embryo. The table below shows the average percentage of yolk in eggs of some bird types:

Goose: 35,1% | Eagle: 12,0% | Duck: 35,4% | Vulture: 14,0% | Chicken: 31,9% | Pigeon: 17,9%

Explain why we may conclude that ducks display precocial development.
question_af:
In voëleiers is die dooier die hoofbron van energie vir die ontwikkelende embrio. Die tabel hieronder toon die gemiddelde persentasie dooier in die eiers van sommige tipes voëls:

Gans: 35,1% | Arend: 12,0% | Eend: 35,4% | Aasvoël: 14,0% | Hoender: 31,9% | Duif: 17,9%

Verduidelik waarom ons kan aflei dat eende prekosiale ontwikkeling vertoon.
memo_answer: The egg has a high percentage (%) of yolk therefore it contains more energy/nutrients; the hatchling will be well developed making it (more) independent.
memo_steps: The egg has a high percentage (%) of yolk (compulsory mark)
Therefore it contains more energy/nutrients
The hatchling will be well developed
Making it (more) independent
notes: Compulsory mark: must state high % yolk. Any 2 further points from memo. Data is embedded in question text.

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
In bird eggs, the yolk is the main source of energy for the developing embryo. The table below shows the average percentage of yolk in eggs of some bird types:

Goose: 35,1% | Eagle: 12,0% | Duck: 35,4% | Vulture: 14,0% | Chicken: 31,9% | Pigeon: 17,9%

Name the THREE bird types that would have a higher degree of parental care.
question_af:
In voëleiers is die dooier die hoofbron van energie vir die ontwikkelende embrio. Die tabel hieronder toon die gemiddelde persentasie dooier in die eiers van sommige tipes voëls:

Gans: 35,1% | Arend: 12,0% | Eend: 35,4% | Aasvoël: 14,0% | Hoender: 31,9% | Duif: 17,9%

Noem die DRIE tipes voëls wat ʹn hoër mate van ouersorg sal hê.
memo_steps: Eagle
Vulture
Pigeon
notes: Mark first THREE named only. These are the birds with low yolk % (altricial development).

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
In bird eggs, the yolk is the main source of energy for the developing embryo. The table below shows the average percentage of yolk in eggs of some bird types:

Goose: 35,1% | Eagle: 12,0% | Duck: 35,4% | Vulture: 14,0% | Chicken: 31,9% | Pigeon: 17,9%

Give a reason why the birds named in QUESTION 2.1.2 (Eagle, Vulture, Pigeon) would have a higher degree of parental care.
question_af:
In voëleiers is die dooier die hoofbron van energie vir die ontwikkelende embrio. Die tabel hieronder toon die gemiddelde persentasie dooier in die eiers van sommige tipes voëls:

Gans: 35,1% | Arend: 12,0% | Eend: 35,4% | Aasvoël: 14,0% | Hoender: 31,9% | Duif: 17,9%

Gee ʹn rede vir jou antwoord op VRAAG 2.1.2 (Arend, Aasvoël, Duif).
memo_answer: The eggs have a lower percentage (%) of yolk therefore the hatchlings will not be fully developed.
memo_steps: The eggs have a lower percentage (%) of yolk
Therefore the hatchlings will not be fully developed (altricial development requires more parental care)

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: Explain the role of the scrotum in sperm production.
question_af: Verduidelik die rol van die skrotum tydens spermproduksie.
memo_answer: It maintains the temperature of the testes lower than body temperature to ensure the production of good quality/quantity of sperm. OR It protects the testes from (mechanical) injury to ensure the production of good quality/quantity of sperm.
memo_steps: It maintains the temperature of the testes/part C lower than body temperature
To ensure the production of good quality/quantity of sperm
OR: It protects the testes from (mechanical) injury
To ensure the production of good quality/quantity of sperm
notes: 2 marks; either temperature OR protection explanation accepted

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: Name and describe the process of sperm production.
question_af: Noem en beskryf die proses van spermproduksie.
memo_answer: Spermatogenesis. Under the influence of testosterone, diploid cells in the seminiferous tubules/testes undergo meiosis to form haploid (sperm) cells.
memo_steps: Spermatogenesis (compulsory name)
Under the influence of testosterone
Diploid cells
In the seminiferous tubules/testes
Undergo meiosis
To form haploid (sperm) cells
notes: Compulsory mark: 'Spermatogenesis'. Any 4 further points from memo. Total 5 marks.

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
The thickness of the endometrium varies throughout the menstrual cycle of a female. The following data was recorded:

Day 0: 14mm | Day 7: 3mm | Day 14: 5mm | Day 21: 13mm | Day 28: 16mm

Referring to ovarian hormones, explain the DECREASE in thickness of the endometrium from day 0 to day 7.
question_af:
Die dikte van die endometrium varieer regdeur die menstruele siklus van ʹn vrou. Die volgende data is aangeteken:

Dag 0: 14mm | Dag 7: 3mm | Dag 14: 5mm | Dag 21: 13mm | Dag 28: 16mm

Deur te verwys na hormone van die ovarium, verduidelik die AFNAME in dikte van die endometrium van dag 0 tot dag 7.
memo_answer: The corpus luteum degenerates therefore the progesterone levels decrease; the endometrium is no longer maintained/menstruation occurs.
memo_steps: The corpus luteum degenerates
Therefore the progesterone levels decrease
The endometrium is no longer maintained/menstruation occurs
notes: 3 marks; data fully embedded in question

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
The thickness of the endometrium varies throughout the menstrual cycle of a female. The following data was recorded:

Day 0: 14mm | Day 7: 3mm | Day 14: 5mm | Day 21: 13mm | Day 28: 16mm

Referring to ovarian hormones, explain the INCREASE in thickness of the endometrium from day 7 to day 14.
question_af:
Die dikte van die endometrium varieer regdeur die menstruele siklus van ʹn vrou. Die volgende data is aangeteken:

Dag 0: 14mm | Dag 7: 3mm | Dag 14: 5mm | Dag 21: 13mm | Dag 28: 16mm

Deur te verwys na hormone van die ovarium, verduidelik die TOENAME in dikte van die endometrium van dag 7 tot dag 14.
memo_answer: The Graafian follicle secretes oestrogen which increases endometrium thickness.
memo_steps: The Graafian follicle secretes oestrogen
Which increases endometrium thickness
notes: 2 marks; data fully embedded in question

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: Describe changes in the endometrium that cause it to become thicker.
question_af: Beskryf veranderinge in die endometrium wat veroorsaak dat dit dikker word.
memo_answer: It becomes more vascular and more glandular.
memo_steps: It becomes more vascular
And more glandular

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: State the significance of the change in endometrium thickness described in QUESTION 2.3.2 (the endometrium becoming more vascular and glandular).
question_af: Noem die belangrikheid van die verandering in die dikte van die endometrium, soos beskryf in VRAAG 2.3.2 (die endometrium wat meer bloedvatryk en klierryk word).
memo_answer: It allows for implantation of the embryo/the development of the placenta/increased blood supply for nutrition of the developing embryo.
memo_steps: Allows for implantation of the embryo
OR the development of the placenta
OR increased blood supply for nutrition of the developing embryo

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: Name the part of the brain that controls thermoregulation.
question_af: Noem die deel van die brein wat termoregulering beheer.
memo_steps: Hypothalamus

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
Scientists investigated the effect of added growth hormone on the height of children with Idiopathic Short Stature (ISS). Boys aged 2 with ISS were divided into two groups: Group A received human growth hormone at 0,028 mg per kg body weight daily; Group B received no hormone treatment. Height was measured monthly until age 18. At 18 years, Group A's average height was 8 cm more than Group B's.

State the dependent variable of this investigation.
question_af:
Wetenskaplikes het die invloed van bygevoegde groeihormoon op die lengte van kinders met Idiopatiese Kort Statuur (IKS) ondersoek. Seuns van 2 jaar met IKS is in twee groepe verdeel: Groep A het menslike groeihormoon teen 0,028 mg per kg liggaamsmassa daagliks ontvang; Groep B het geen hormoonbehandeling ontvang nie. Lengte is maandeliks gemeet tot ouderdom 18. Teen 18 jaar was Groep A se gemiddelde lengte 8 cm meer as Groep B.

Noem die afhanklike veranderlike vir hierdie ondersoek.
memo_steps: Height

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
Scientists investigated the effect of added growth hormone on the height of children with Idiopathic Short Stature (ISS). Boys aged 2 with ISS were divided into two groups: Group A received human growth hormone at 0,028 mg per kg body weight daily; Group B received no hormone treatment. Height was measured monthly until age 18. At 18 years, Group A's average height was 8 cm more than Group B's.

List THREE variables that were kept constant and which contributed to the validity of the investigation.
question_af:
Wetenskaplikes het die invloed van bygevoegde groeihormoon op die lengte van kinders met Idiopatiese Kort Statuur (IKS) ondersoek. Seuns van 2 jaar met IKS is in twee groepe verdeel: Groep A het menslike groeihormoon teen 0,028 mg per kg liggaamsmassa daagliks ontvang; Groep B het geen hormoonbehandeling ontvang nie. Lengte is maandeliks gemeet tot ouderdom 18. Teen 18 jaar was Groep A se gemiddelde lengte 8 cm meer as Groep B.

Maak ʹn lys van DRIE veranderlikes wat konstant gehou is en tot die geldigheid van die ondersoek bygedra het.
memo_answer: Gender/only boys participated; all the boys had ISS; age/all the boys were 2-years old; duration of investigation.
memo_steps: Gender/only boys participated
All the boys had ISS
Age/all the boys were 2-years old
Duration of investigation
notes: Mark first THREE only; any 3 from the list

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
Scientists investigated the effect of added growth hormone on the height of children with Idiopathic Short Stature (ISS). Boys aged 2 with ISS were divided into two groups: Group A received human growth hormone at 0,028 mg per kg body weight daily; Group B received no hormone treatment. Height was measured monthly until age 18. At 18 years, Group A's average height was 8 cm more than Group B's.

Explain the purpose of Group B in this investigation.
question_af:
Wetenskaplikes het die invloed van bygevoegde groeihormoon op die lengte van kinders met Idiopatiese Kort Statuur (IKS) ondersoek. Seuns van 2 jaar met IKS is in twee groepe verdeel: Groep A het menslike groeihormoon teen 0,028 mg per kg liggaamsmassa daagliks ontvang; Groep B het geen hormoonbehandeling ontvang nie. Lengte is maandeliks gemeet tot ouderdom 18. Teen 18 jaar was Groep A se gemiddelde lengte 8 cm meer as Groep B.

Verduidelik die doel van Groep B in hierdie ondersoek.
memo_answer: To prove that it is the added growth hormone that caused the change in the height of the boys and not any other factor.
memo_steps: To prove that it is the added growth hormone that caused the change in the height of the boys
And not any other factor (acts as a control group)

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
Scientists investigated the effect of added growth hormone on the height of children with Idiopathic Short Stature (ISS). Group A received human growth hormone at a daily dosage of 0,028 mg per kg of body weight.

Calculate the daily amount of added human growth hormone that was given to a boy with a mass of 25 kg. Show ALL your working, INCLUDING the correct unit.
question_af:
Wetenskaplikes het die invloed van bygevoegde groeihormoon op die lengte van kinders met IKS ondersoek. Groep A het menslike groeihormoon teen 'n daaglikse dosis van 0,028 mg per kg liggaamsmassa ontvang.

Bereken die daaglikse hoeveelheid bygevoegde menslike groeihormoon wat aan ʹn seun met ʹn massa van 25 kg gegee is. Toon AL jou berekeninge, ASOOK die korrekte eenheid.
memo_steps: mg (correct unit)
notes: 3 marks: 1 for working, 1 for value, 1 for unit

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
Scientists investigated the effect of added growth hormone on the height of children with Idiopathic Short Stature (ISS). At 18 years of age, the average height in Group A (who received growth hormone) was 8 cm more than that in Group B (no treatment).

Give a conclusion for this investigation.
question_af:
Wetenskaplikes het die invloed van bygevoegde groeihormoon op die lengte van kinders met IKS ondersoek. Teen die ouderdom van 18 jaar was die gemiddelde lengte in Groep A (wat groeihormoon ontvang het) 8 cm meer as in Groep B (geen behandeling nie).

Gee ʹn gevolgtrekking vir hierdie ondersoek.
memo_answer: Added growth hormone causes an increase in height of children with ISS.
memo_steps: Added growth hormone causes an increase in height of children with ISS

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: Describe the appearance of the cornea of an eye with astigmatism.
question_af: Beskryf die voorkoms van die kornea van ʹn oog met astigmatisme.
memo_steps: It is not evenly curved/rounded

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: Explain how astigmatism affects vision.
question_af: Verduidelik hoe astigmatisme visie beïnvloed.
memo_answer: The light is refracted unevenly/in different directions and does not focus on the retina, forming a blurred image.
memo_steps: The light is refracted unevenly/in different directions
And does not focus on the retina
Forming a blurred image

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: Give ONE treatment for astigmatism.
question_af: Gee EEN behandeling vir astigmatisme.
memo_steps: Laser
OR Surgery
OR Glasses/spectacles/lenses
notes: 1 mark; any one acceptable answer; mark first ONE only

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: The diagrams show the brain (with parts labelled A = cerebrum region, B = cerebellum region, C = medulla oblongata region) and a cross-section of the spinal cord with a receptor (D) and effector (E). Name the branch of the nervous system represented by the parts shown.
question_af: Die diagramme toon die brein (met dele gemerk A = serebrum gebied, B = serebellum gebied, C = medulla oblongata gebied) en 'n deursnee van die rugmurg met 'n reseptor (D) en effektor (E). Noem die vertakking (afdeling) van die senuweestelsel wat verteenwoordig word deur die dele wat getoon word.
memo_steps: Central nervous system
notes: 1 mark; question references a diagram but the answer is a standalone factual term requiring no visual information to answer correctly if parts are described

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: Describe the pathway of an impulse from a receptor (D, located in the skin/peripheral) through the spinal cord to an effector (E, a muscle/gland), to bring about a reflex action.
question_af: Beskryf die pad van ʹn impuls vanaf 'n reseptor (D, geleë in die vel/periferie) deur die rugmurg tot by 'n effektor (E, 'n spier/klier), om ʹn refleksaksie teweeg te bring.
memo_answer: The impulse is transmitted by the sensory neuron via the dorsal root of the spinal nerve to the interneuron and to the motor neuron by synaptic contact. It is then transmitted via the ventral root (of the spinal nerve) to the effector which brings about the reflex action.
memo_steps: The impulse is transmitted by the sensory neuron
Via the dorsal root of the spinal nerve
To the interneuron
And to the motor neuron
By synaptic contact
It is then transmitted via the ventral root (of the spinal nerve)
To the effector which brings about the reflex action
notes: 6 marks; any 6 from memo; pathway question is fully answerable from knowledge without the diagram

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: Describe how the human eye ACCOMMODATES for distant vision.
question_af: Beskryf hoe die menslike oog vir ver visie AKKOMMODEER.
memo_answer: Ciliary muscles relax; suspensory ligaments become taut/tension on the lens increases; the lens becomes less convex causing light to be refracted less; to form a clear image on the retina.
memo_steps: Ciliary muscles relax
Suspensory ligaments become taut/tension on the lens increases
The lens becomes less convex
Causing light to be refracted less
To form a clear image on the retina

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: Describe how balance is restored when there is a change in the speed and direction of head movement.
question_af: Beskryf hoe balans herstel word wanneer daar ʹn verandering in die spoed en rigting van die beweging van die kop is.
memo_answer: Cristae are stimulated and convert the stimulus to an impulse which is sent via the auditory nerve to the cerebellum for interpretation. Impulses are then sent to the skeletal muscles to restore balance.
memo_steps: Cristae are stimulated
And convert the stimulus to an impulse
Which is sent via the auditory nerve
To the cerebellum for interpretation
Impulses are then sent to the skeletal muscles to restore balance

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
When a person is exposed to loud noise over a long period, it may lead to noise-induced hearing loss (NIHL), which is caused by damage to the hair cells in the organ of Corti. These cells are not repaired when damaged. Placing earplugs in the auditory canal can prevent damage to the hair cells.

Explain how damage to the hair cells in the organ of Corti can lead to hearing loss.
question_af:
Wanneer ʹn persoon oor ʹn lang tydperk aan harde geraas blootgestel word, kan dit tot geraas-geïnduseerde gehoorverlies (GGGV) lei, wat deur skade aan die haarselle in die orgaan van Corti veroorsaak word. Hierdie selle word nie herstel wanneer hulle beskadig is nie. Skade aan die haarselle kan voorkom word deur oorpluisies in die gehoorgang te plaas.

Verduidelik hoe skade aan die haarselle in die orgaan van Corti tot gehoorverlies kan lei.
memo_answer: Fewer/no stimuli will be converted into impulses; fewer/no impulses will be sent to the cerebrum to be interpreted.
memo_steps: Fewer/no stimuli will be converted into impulses
Fewer/no impulses will be sent to the cerebrum to be interpreted

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
When a person is exposed to loud noise over a long period, it may lead to noise-induced hearing loss (NIHL), which is caused by damage to the hair cells in the organ of Corti. These cells are not repaired when damaged. Placing earplugs in the auditory canal can prevent damage to the hair cells.

Explain how earplugs can prevent damage to the hair cells in the organ of Corti.
question_af:
Wanneer ʹn persoon oor ʹn lang tydperk aan harde geraas blootgestel word, kan dit tot geraas-geïnduseerde gehoorverlies (GGGV) lei, wat deur skade aan die haarselle in die orgaan van Corti veroorsaak word. Hierdie selle word nie herstel wanneer hulle beskadig is nie.

Verduidelik hoe oorpluisies skade aan die haarselle in die orgaan van Corti kan voorkom.
memo_answer: The earplugs limit the sound waves in the auditory canal/reaching the tympanic membrane; fewer vibrations are formed in the middle ear; fewer pressure waves are formed in the cochlea to prevent damage.
memo_steps: The earplugs limit the sound waves in the auditory canal/reaching the tympanic membrane
Fewer vibrations are formed in the middle ear
Fewer pressure waves are formed in the cochlea to prevent damage

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: Name the organ that secretes insulin.
question_af: Noem die orgaan wat insulien sekreteer (afskei).
memo_steps: Pancreas

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
A graph shows blood insulin concentration over 23 hours for three people. Person A is healthy; Person B has diabetes and received rapid-acting insulin before each of 3 meals; Person C has diabetes and received one daily long-acting insulin injection at 23:00. The graph shows Person B's insulin peaks correspond to 3 separate meal times.

State the number of meals that were eaten during the 23-hour period.
question_af:
ʹn Grafiek toon bloed-insulienkonsentrasie oor 23 uur vir drie mense. Persoon A is gesond; Persoon B het diabetes en het vinnigwerkende insulien voor elk van 3 maaltye ontvang; Persoon C het diabetes en het een daaglikse langwerkende insulieninspuiting om 23:00 ontvang. Die grafiek toon dat Persoon B se insulienpieke ooreenstem met 3 afsonderlike maaltye.

Noem die getal maaltye wat in die 23-uur-tydperk geëet is.
memo_steps: Three (3 meals)
notes: 1 mark; answer can be inferred from context in question — Person B receives rapid-acting insulin before each meal and the graph shows 3 peaks

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
A graph shows blood insulin concentration over 23 hours. Person B (diabetes, rapid-acting insulin before each of 3 meals) shows 3 sharp peaks reaching about 30 international units, with insulin dropping to near zero between meals. Person C (diabetes, long-acting insulin injected at 23:00) shows a constant low level of about 10 international units throughout the 23-hour period.

Tabulate TWO differences between long-acting insulin treatment and rapid-acting insulin treatment over the 23-hour period.
question_af:
ʹn Grafiek toon insulienkonsentrasie van die bloed oor 23 uur. Persoon B (diabetes, vinnigwerkende insulien voor elk van 3 maaltye) toon 3 skerp pieke van ongeveer 30 internasionale eenhede, met insulien wat tot byna nul daal tussen maaltye. Persoon C (diabetes, langwerkende insulien ingespuit om 23:00) toon 'n konstante lae vlak van ongeveer 10 internasionale eenhede regdeur die 23-uur-tydperk.

Tabuleer TWEE verskille tussen langwerkende insulienbehandeling en vinnigwerkende insulienbehandeling oor die tydperk van 23 uur.
memo_answer: Any TWO rows from: (1) One injection vs three injections over 23 hours; (2) Given at 23:00 vs given before every meal; (3) Lower concentration (10 IU) vs higher concentration (30 IU); (4) Concentration remains constant for long periods vs concentration fluctuates; (5) Long-lasting effect vs shorter-lasting effect; (6) Takes 1 hour to reach peak vs takes 2 hours to reach peak.
memo_steps: Long-acting: one injection over 23 hours | Rapid-acting: three injections over 23 hours
Long-acting: injection given at 23:00 | Rapid-acting: injection given before every meal
Long-acting: causes lower concentration of insulin (~10 IU) | Rapid-acting: causes higher concentration (~30 IU)
Long-acting: concentration remains constant for long periods (~20 hours) | Rapid-acting: concentration fluctuates/increases and drops
Long-acting: long-lasting effect | Rapid-acting: shorter duration of effect
Long-acting: takes 1 hour to reach peak | Rapid-acting: takes 2 hours to reach peak
notes: 5 marks: 1 for table format + any 2 complete differences (2 x 2 = 4). Mark first TWO differences only. Graph data is summarised in the question text.

subject: Life Sciences
question_en:
A healthy person (Person A) shows natural insulin peaks that rise sharply after meals and return to baseline. Person B receives rapid-acting insulin before each meal; Person C receives long-acting insulin once daily.

Name the type of insulin treatment that is similar to insulin secretion in a healthy person.
question_af:
ʹn Gesonde persoon (Persoon A) toon natuurlike insulienpieke wat skerp styg na maaltye en terugkeer na basislyn. Persoon B ontvang vinnigwerkende insulien voor elke maaltyd; Persoon C ontvang langwerkende insulien een keer daagliks.

Noem die tipe insulienbehandeling wat soortgelyk aan die insulienafskeiding by ʹn gesonde persoon is.
memo_steps: Rapid-acting insulin (because it produces peaks after each meal, mimicking natural insulin secretion patterns)

subject: Life Sciences
question_en: Explain why person B (a person with diabetes mellitus who received a rapid-acting insulin injection before each meal) may experience a lack of energy after receiving a rapid-acting insulin injection if NO meal is taken.
question_af: Verduidelik waarom persoon B (ʹn persoon met diabetes mellitus wat ʹn vinnigwerkende insulieninspuiting voor elke maaltyd ontvang het) ʹn tekort aan energie kan ervaar ná ʹn vinnigwerkende insulieninspuiting ontvang is, indien GEEN maaltyd geëet word NIE.
memo_answer: The insulin will reduce the glucose level even further/glucose is converted to glycogen/increased glucose uptake by cells; there is less glucose available for cellular respiration.
memo_steps: The insulin will reduce the glucose level even further / glucose is converted to glycogen / increased glucose uptake by cells
There is less glucose available for cellular respiration
